name: @stbr/solana-stablecoin-standard
description: Solana Stablecoin Standard — SSS-1 (Minimal) and SSS-2 (Compliant) stablecoin presets

scripts.build: yarn workspace @stbr/sss-sdk run build && yarn workspace @stbr/sss-cli run build
scripts.clean: yarn workspace @stbr/sss-sdk run clean && yarn workspace @stbr/sss-cli run clean
